retry_reason: kfree_skb frees the skb on error; caller must not reuse the skb after this function fails, so retrying would require a fresh skb.

judge.reason: The primary purpose is to send an skb via cxgb4_ofld_send, not to manage reference counts. The kfree_skb call on the error path is an incidental cleanup operation, not the main function goal.
